## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content performance, strategy, and upcoming tasks for Webstacks and GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Spike in weekly clicks observed; bank website design article performing exceptionally well](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [New content strategy: combining human-written pillar articles with AI-generated "feeder" content](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Need for improved analytics reporting to better understand on-page engagement and content effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [Focus on creating weekly pillar content with supporting cluster articles, guided by keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Spike in weekly clicks after 3 weeks of stagnation](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Bank website design article showing strong early performance](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [10 new articles to be published on Friday (9 completed, 1 in progress)](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Improved AI-assisted process for generating design article descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### Content Creation and Publishing

  - [Devon to provide featured images for this week's articles](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Victoria to stage articles, Aida to publish](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [Feedback on last week's articles: similar structure noted, but performing well](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Devon to add individual page screenshots and conversion panels to articles](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Analytics and Reporting

  - [Current Google Analytics limitations in filtering GrowthX-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Aida to create a custom report in Google Data Studio/Looker Studio](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Focus on engagement metrics: time on page, bounce rate, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Jesse to add Aida to HubSpot for lead generation tracking access](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [New approach: human-written pillar articles + AI-generated "feeder" content](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Weekly creation of pillar content around broad terms (e.g., "headless CMS")](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Emphasis on covering user journey, not just top-of-funnel listicles](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1281.0)
  - [Exploration of bottom-funnel content ideas (e.g., freelancers vs. agencies comparison)](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1364.0)

### Resource Development

  - [Jesse working on a toolkit for making business cases for website projects](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)
  - [Creation of content pillars to drive traffic to service pages](https://fathom.video/share/CPosxY5DZuf6jh2fwsDWRK3kuhGxVcpA?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
